nodes.name: Google Sheets - Read Shift Data
nodes.notes:
Configuration Required:
- Update Document ID to your Google Sheet URL or ID
- Update Sheet Name if different from 'Sheet1'
- Connect Google OAuth2 credential

nodes.name: Filter - Tomorrow's Shifts
nodes.notes:
Configuration Required:
- Adjust date format in toFormat() to match your Google Sheet
- Common formats: 'yyyy-MM-dd', 'MM/dd/yyyy', 'M/d/yyyy'
- Test by adding a Set node after this to display the date comparison

nodes.name: Code - Group Shifts by Employee
nodes.notes: Groups all shifts by Employee UID and preserves row numbers for status updates

nodes.name: Loop Over Items - Process Each Caregiver
nodes.notes: Processes one caregiver at a time. Continue on Fail enabled for resilience.

nodes.name: Code - Build SMS Message
nodes.notes: Creates consolidated SMS message with all shifts for one caregiver

nodes.name: Twilio - Send SMS
nodes.notes:
Configuration Required:
- Update 'from' number to your Twilio phone number (E.164 format: +15551234567)
- Connect Twilio API credential (Account SID + Auth Token)
- Continue on Fail is enabled for error resilience

nodes.name: IF - Check SMS Success
nodes.notes: Checks if SMS sent successfully (no error exists)

nodes.name: Set - Prepare Success Status
nodes.notes: Sets status to 'Notified' and retrieves row numbers from earlier node

nodes.name: Set - Prepare Failed Status
nodes.notes: Sets status to 'Delivery Failed' and captures error message

nodes.name: Merge - Combine Status Results
nodes.notes: Merges success and failure branches back into single flow

nodes.name: Loop Over Items - Update Each Row
nodes.notes: Inner loop: processes each row number to update Google Sheets. Continue on Fail enabled.

nodes.name: Code - Extract Current Row Number
nodes.notes: Extracts individual row number from array for Google Sheets update

nodes.name: Google Sheets - Update Row Status
nodes.notes:
Configuration Required:
- Update Document ID to match Node 2 (same Google Sheet)
- Update Sheet Name if different from 'Sheet1'
- Uses row_number to match and update status column
- Continue on Fail enabled for resilience

parameters.content:
# Caregiver Shift Notifications Workflow

An n8n workflow that automatically sends daily SMS notifications to caregivers about their upcoming shifts via Twilio.

## Overview

This workflow runs daily at 11:45 AM, reads shift data from Google Sheets, filters for tomorrow's shifts with valid phone numbers, groups multiple shifts per caregiver into a single consolidated message, sends SMS notifications via Twilio, and updates the Google Sheets status column based on delivery results.

## Workflow Architecture

```
Schedule Trigger (11:45 AM daily)
    ↓
Google Sheets: Read All Rows
    ↓
Filter: Tomorrow's Shifts + Valid Phone Numbers
    ↓
Code Node: Group Shifts by Employee
    ↓
Loop Over Items (One Caregiver at a Time)
    ↓
Code Node: Build SMS Message
    ↓
Twilio: Send SMS
    ↓
IF Node: Check Success/Failure
    ↓ (success)              ↓ (failure)
Set: "Notified"          Set: "Delivery Failed"
    ↓                           ↓
Merge: Combine Results
    ↓
Loop Over Items (Each Shift Row)
    ↓
Code Node: Extract Row Number
    ↓
Google Sheets: Update Status Column
    ↓ (loop back until complete)
```

**Total Nodes:** 13
**Expected Execution Time:** 60-90 seconds for 20 caregivers with 40 shifts
**Cost:** ~$0.15/day in Twilio SMS fees (20 caregivers @ $0.0075/SMS)

## Prerequisites

### 1. Google Sheets Setup

Your Google Sheet must contain these columns (exact names, case-sensitive):

| Column Name | Purpose | Example |
|-------------|---------|---------|
| `status` | Updated by workflow | "Notified" or "Delivery Failed" |
| `Employee UID` | Unique identifier | "EMP001" |
| `Employee Full Name` | Used in SMS greeting | "Jane Doe" |
| `Employee Email` | Not currently used | "jane@example.com" |
| `Employee Phone (Mobile)` | SMS destination | "+15551234567" |
| `Client Full Name` | Displayed in SMS | "John Smith" |
| `Client Address` | Displayed in SMS | "123 Main St" |
| `Visit Scheduled Duration` | Not used in SMS | "2 hours" |
| `Visit Start Date` | Filter for tomorrow | "2026-01-29" or "01/29/2026" |
| `Visit Start Time` | For sorting | "09:00:00" |
| `Visit Start Time of Day` | Human-readable start | "9:00 AM" |
| `Visit End Date` | Not currently used | "2026-01-29" |
| `Visit End Time of Day` | Human-readable end | "11:00 AM" |
| `Visit End Time` | Not currently used | "11:00:00" |

**Important Notes:**
- Phone numbers must be in E.164 format: `+[country code][phone number]` (e.g., `+15551234567` for US)
- Date format in "Visit Start Date" must be consistent across all rows
- Empty phone numbers will be automatically filtered out

### 2. Google OAuth2 Credentials

**In Google Cloud Console:**
1. Go to [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com)
2. Create a new project or select an existing one
3. Enable **Google Sheets API**
4. Go to "Credentials" → "Create Credentials" → "OAuth 2.0 Client ID"
5. Application type: **Web application**
6. Add authorized redirect URI: `https://n8n.204it.ca/rest/oauth2-credential/callback`
7. Copy **Client ID** and **Client Secret**

**In n8n:**
1. Go to **Settings → Credentials**
2. Click **"Create New Credential"**
3. Select **"Google OAuth2 API"**
4. Paste Client ID and Client Secret
5. Add scope: `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets`
6. Click **"Connect to Google"** and authorize
7. Save the credential

### 3. Twilio Account Setup

**Sign up and Configure:**
1. Sign up at [twilio.com](https://www.twilio.com)
2. Purchase a phone number (costs vary by country, ~$1/month for US)
3. Fund your account (recommended: $20 minimum)
4. Find **Account SID** and **Auth Token** in Twilio dashboard

**SMS Pricing:**
- US: ~$0.0075 per SMS segment
- Long messages automatically split into multiple segments
- Messages with multiple shifts typically 2-3 segments

**In n8n:**
1. Go to **Settings → Credentials**
2. Click **"Create New Credential"**
3. Select **"Twilio API"**
4. Paste Account SID and Auth Token
5. Save the credential

## Deployment Instructions

### Option A: Import via n8n UI (Recommended)

1. Open your n8n instance: [https://n8n.204it.ca](https://n8n.204it.ca)
2. Click **"Add workflow"** → **"Import from File"**
3. Select [caregiver-shift-notifications-daily.json](caregiver-shift-notifications-daily.json)
4. The workflow will open in the editor

5. **Configure credentials and settings:**

   **Node 2: "Google Sheets - Read Shift Data"**
   - Click on the node
   - Select your Google OAuth2 credential
   - Update **Document ID**: Enter your Google Sheet URL or ID
   - Update **Sheet Name**: Enter your sheet name (e.g., "Shifts", "Sheet1")

   **Node 3: "Filter - Tomorrow's Shifts"**
   - Click on the node
   - Review the date filter condition
   - **CRITICAL**: Adjust `.toFormat()` to match your sheet's date format:
     - If dates look like "2026-01-29", use `.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd')` ✓ (default)
     - If dates look like "01/29/2026", use `.toFormat('MM/dd/yyyy')`
     - If dates look like "1/29/2026", use `.toFormat('M/d/yyyy')`

   **Node 7: "Twilio - Send SMS"**
   - Click on the node
   - Select your Twilio API credential
   - Update **"from"** field: Replace `+15551234567` with your Twilio phone number

   **Node 13: "Google Sheets - Update Row Status"**
   - Click on the node
   - Select the same Google OAuth2 credential as Node 2
   - Update **Document ID** to match Node 2
   - Update **Sheet Name** to match Node 2

6. **Enable "Continue on Fail" on critical nodes:**
   - Right-click on each of these nodes → **Settings** → **Continue on Fail: ON**
     - Node 5: Loop Over Items - Process Each Caregiver
     - Node 7: Twilio - Send SMS
     - Node 11: Loop Over Items - Update Each Row
     - Node 13: Google Sheets - Update Row Status

7. **Set timezone for Schedule Trigger:**
   - Click on Node 1: "Schedule Trigger - Daily 11:45 AM"
   - Expand **Options**
   - Set **Timezone** to your local timezone

8. Click **"Save"**

### Option B: Deploy via n8n API

```bash
# Set your n8n API key and URL
N8N_API_KEY="your-api-key-here"
N8N_URL="https://n8n.204it.ca"

# Deploy workflow
curl -X POST "${N8N_URL}/api/v1/workflows" \
  -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: ${N8N_API_KEY}" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d @caregiver-shift-notifications-daily.json
```

**Note:** After API deployment, you must still configure credentials and placeholders through the n8n UI.

## Configuration Checklist

Use this checklist to ensure everything is set up correctly:

### Before Deployment
- [ ] Google Sheet exists with all required columns
- [ ] Column names match exactly (case-sensitive)
- [ ] Phone numbers formatted as +[country][number] (E.164 format)
- [ ] Date format in "Visit Start Date" is consistent
- [ ] Twilio account created and funded ($20+ recommended)
- [ ] Twilio phone number purchased
- [ ] Google Cloud OAuth2 credentials created
- [ ] n8n credentials configured for Google Sheets and Twilio

### During Configuration
- [ ] Workflow imported to n8n
- [ ] Node 2: Google OAuth2 credential connected
- [ ] Node 2: Document ID updated to your Google Sheet
- [ ] Node 2: Sheet Name updated (if not "Sheet1")
- [ ] Node 3: Date format in filter matches your sheet
- [ ] Node 7: Twilio credential connected
- [ ] Node 7: "from" number updated to your Twilio number
- [ ] Node 13: Google OAuth2 credential connected (same as Node 2)
- [ ] Node 13: Document ID matches Node 2
- [ ] Node 13: Sheet Name matches Node 2
- [ ] Continue on Fail enabled on Nodes 5, 7, 11, 13
- [ ] Schedule trigger timezone set correctly
- [ ] Workflow saved

### Testing Phase
- [ ] Manual test execution completed
- [ ] Test SMS received successfully
- [ ] Message format looks correct
- [ ] Google Sheets status column updated
- [ ] Date filtering working (only tomorrow's shifts)
- [ ] Error handling tested (invalid phone number)
- [ ] Multiple shifts per caregiver grouped correctly

### Production Activation
- [ ] All tests passed
- [ ] Workflow activated (toggle "Active" switch to ON)
- [ ] First automatic execution monitored (11:45 AM next day)
- [ ] Caregivers confirmed receiving notifications
- [ ] Status column verified in Google Sheets

## Testing Guide

### Phase 1: Test with Sample Data

**Setup:**
1. Create a copy of your Google Sheet or add test rows
2. Set "Visit Start Date" to **tomorrow's date**
3. Use your own phone number in "Employee Phone (Mobile)"
4. Create 2-3 test rows with the same Employee UID (to test grouping)

**Execute:**
1. Open the workflow in n8n editor
2. Click **"Execute Workflow"** button (play icon at bottom)
3. Watch each node execute in sequence

**Verify:**
1. **Filter node output:** Should show only tomorrow's shifts with valid phone numbers
2. **Grouping node output:** Should show employee object with shifts array
3. **SMS message node output:** Should show formatted message
4. **Twilio node output:** Check for success status (no error field)
5. **Your phone:** Should receive SMS within 1-2 minutes
6. **Google Sheets:** Status column should update to "Notified"

### Phase 2: Test Error Handling

**Test invalid phone number:**
1. Add a row with tomorrow's date but invalid phone: `1234567890` (missing +)
2. Execute workflow manually
3. Verify:
   - Workflow continues (doesn't crash)
   - Status for that row = "Delivery Failed"
   - Other caregivers still get notified

**Test empty phone number:**
1. Add a row with tomorrow's date but empty phone field
2. Execute workflow manually
3. Verify:
   - Row filtered out (not processed at all)
   - No error occurs

### Phase 3: Production Monitoring

**Day 1 (11:45 AM):**
- [ ] Check n8n execution history - should be green
- [ ] Review execution time (should be <2 minutes)
- [ ] Check Google Sheets status column
- [ ] Call 2-3 caregivers to verify SMS received
- [ ] Verify message content accuracy

**Day 2-7:**
- [ ] Daily execution history check
- [ ] Review "Delivery Failed" rows if any
- [ ] Fix bad phone numbers in Google Sheets
- [ ] Monitor caregiver feedback

**Week 2+:**
- [ ] Weekly execution review
- [ ] Monthly Twilio cost review
- [ ] Adjust message format if needed based on feedback

## SMS Message Format

Caregivers receive a message in this format:

```
Hi Jane Doe,

You have 2 shifts scheduled for Wednesday, January 29:

1. John Smith
   Time: 9:00 AM - 11:00 AM
   Address: 123 Main St

2. Mary Johnson
   Time: 1:00 PM - 3:30 PM
   Address: 456 Oak Ave

Please arrive on time. Thank you!
```

**Message Features:**
- Friendly greeting with caregiver's name
- Clear count of shifts (handles singular/plural)
- Numbered list of all shifts
- Client name, time, and address for each shift
- Professional closing

**Character Count:**
- Single shift: ~150-200 characters (1 SMS segment)
- Two shifts: ~300-350 characters (2-3 SMS segments)
- Three+ shifts: May exceed 3 segments

## Troubleshooting

### Issue: No SMS Sent

**Symptoms:** Workflow executes but no texts received

**Check:**
1. Open workflow execution in n8n
2. Click on "Filter - Tomorrow's Shifts" node
3. Check output count - is it 0?

**Solutions:**
- **If filter output = 0:** No shifts scheduled for tomorrow, or date format mismatch
  - Verify "Visit Start Date" in Google Sheets = tomorrow's date
  - Check date format in Filter node matches your sheet format
  - Add debug Set node after Filter to display: `{{ $today.plus({ days: 1 }).toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}`
  - Compare to actual date in your sheet, adjust format accordingly

- **If filter output > 0 but no SMS:**
  - Click on "Twilio - Send SMS" node to see error message
  - Common errors:
    - Invalid "from" number: Update to your Twilio phone number
    - Invalid "to" number: Check phone format (must be +[country][number])
    - Insufficient balance: Fund Twilio account
    - Invalid credentials: Reconnect Twilio credential in n8n

### Issue: Wrong Date Filtered

**Symptoms:** Workflow sends notifications for wrong day (today or next week)

**Cause:** Date format mismatch between filter expression and Google Sheets

**Solution:**
1. Check how dates appear in your Google Sheets "Visit Start Date" column
2. Update Node 3 (Filter) condition to match:

```javascript
// If your dates look like: "2026-01-29"
={{ $today.plus({ days: 1 }).toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}

// If your dates look like: "01/29/2026"
={{ $today.plus({ days: 1 }).toFormat('MM/dd/yyyy') }}

// If your dates look like: "1/29/2026"
={{ $today.plus({ days: 1 }).toFormat('M/d/yyyy') }}
```

3. Test by adding a Set node after Filter with this expression:
```javascript
{{ $today.plus({ days: 1 }).toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}
```
4. Compare output to actual dates in Google Sheets
5. Adjust format and re-test

### Issue: Status Column Not Updated

**Symptoms:** SMS sent successfully but Google Sheets status stays empty

**Check:**
1. Open workflow execution
2. Click on "Google Sheets - Update Row Status" node
3. Check for error message in output

**Solutions:**
- **Column name mismatch:**
  - Verify column is named exactly `status` (lowercase, no spaces)
  - Column names are case-sensitive

- **Permission issue:**
  - Reconnect Google OAuth2 credential
  - Ensure scope includes `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/spreadsheets`
  - Test credential by manually running Node 2 (Read)

- **Row number mismatch:**
  - Verify "Code - Extract Current Row Number" node output shows valid row numbers
  - Check that Google Sheets hasn't changed (rows added/deleted)
  - If rows frequently change, consider alternative matching (by Employee UID + Date)

- **API quota exceeded:**
  - Check Google Cloud Console for API quota usage
  - Free tier: 500 requests per 100 seconds (should be sufficient)
  - If exceeded, wait and retry or increase quota

### Issue: Multiple SMS to Same Caregiver

**Symptoms:** Caregiver receives 2+ separate messages instead of one consolidated message

**Cause:** Grouping by Employee UID not working correctly

**Check:**
1. Click on "Code - Group Shifts by Employee" node in execution
2. Verify output shows one item per employee with shifts array
3. If showing multiple items for same employee, check:
   - Employee UID is consistent in Google Sheets (no typos)
   - Employee UID field exists and not empty

**Solution:**
- Standardize Employee UID format in Google Sheets
- Ensure no trailing spaces or special characters in UID values
- Alternatively, modify Node 4 code to group by `Employee Full Name` instead of UID

### Issue: Message Format Broken

**Symptoms:** SMS message missing data or showing "undefined"

**Cause:** Missing or null values in Google Sheets

**Check:**
1. Click on "Code - Build SMS Message" node in execution
2. Check output `smsMessage` field for "undefined" or missing values
3. Review Google Sheets for empty cells in required columns

**Solutions:**
- Fill in missing data in Google Sheets (Client Full Name, Times, Address)
- Add null checks to Node 6 code:

```javascript
// Add at top of code
const clientName = shift.clientName || 'Client TBD';
const clientAddress = shift.clientAddress || 'Address TBD';
```

- Test with various edge cases (missing address, missing time, etc.)

## Monitoring and Maintenance

### Daily Monitoring (First Week)

**What to check:**
1. **11:46 AM:** Open n8n execution history
2. Verify workflow completed successfully (green checkmark)
3. Check execution time (should be <2 minutes)
4. Review Google Sheets status column:
   - Count "Notified" rows
   - Investigate any "Delivery Failed" rows
5. Spot-check with 2-3 caregivers (text or call to confirm receipt)

### Weekly Monitoring (Ongoing)

**Tasks:**
1. Review execution history for patterns
   - Any consistent failures?
   - Execution time increasing?
2. Check Twilio dashboard:
   - Message delivery rate (should be >95%)
   - Cost per day vs budget
3. Audit "Delivery Failed" rows:
   - Fix bad phone numbers
   - Remove terminated employees
4. Gather caregiver feedback:
   - Is timing good? (11:45 AM)
   - Is message format clear?
   - Any information missing?

### Monthly Maintenance

**Review:**
1. **Cost analysis:**
   - Twilio spending vs budget
   - SMS segment count (consider shortening message if high)
   - API quota usage (Google Sheets, Twilio)

2. **Data quality:**
   - Remove old/completed shifts
   - Verify phone numbers still valid
   - Check for duplicate Employee UIDs

3. **Workflow optimization:**
   - Consider adding Wait node if >50 caregivers (rate limiting)
   - Review execution time trends
   - Update message format based on feedback

4. **Credential maintenance:**
   - Verify OAuth tokens still valid
   - Refresh Twilio credentials if needed
   - Check Google Cloud Console for any security alerts

### Alerts to Configure

**In n8n (if available):**
- Workflow execution failure → Email to admin
- Error rate >10% → Slack notification

**In Twilio:**
- Account balance <$5 → Email alert
- Message delivery failure spike → SMS to admin

**In Google Sheets (manual):**
- Conditional formatting: Highlight "Delivery Failed" rows in red
- Formula to count daily notifications: `=COUNTIF(A:A, "Notified")`
- Alert if count significantly lower than expected

## Scaling Considerations

### Current Capacity
- **Caregivers:** Up to 100 comfortably
- **Shifts:** Up to 500 per day
- **Execution time:** 5-10 minutes at scale
- **Cost:** ~$0.75/day for 100 caregivers

### If You Need to Scale Beyond

**For 100+ caregivers:**
1. Add Wait node (1 second) after Twilio node to prevent rate limiting
2. Consider Twilio Messaging Service for higher throughput
3. Optimize Google Sheets updates (batch instead of individual)

**For 500+ shifts:**
1. Split workflow by region/team (multiple workflows)
2. Use Code node for batch Google Sheets updates
3. Consider database instead of Google Sheets

**For multiple notifications per day:**
1. Clone workflow with different schedule times
2. Add parameter to filter by notification type
3. Consider workflow state management to avoid duplicate sends

## Common Modifications

### Change Notification Time

**To send at different time (e.g., 7:00 AM instead of 11:45 AM):**

1. Click on "Schedule Trigger - Daily 11:45 AM" node
2. Update cron expression:
   - For 7:00 AM: `0 7 * * *`
   - For 8:30 PM: `30 20 * * *`
   - Format: `[minute] [hour] * * *` (24-hour format)
3. Update node name for clarity
4. Save workflow

### Send for Today's Shifts (Instead of Tomorrow)

**To notify about same-day shifts:**

1. Click on "Filter - Tomorrow's Shifts" node
2. Change condition from:
   ```javascript
   {{ $today.plus({ days: 1 }).toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}
   ```
   To:
   ```javascript
   {{ $today.toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}
   ```
3. Update node name: "Filter - Today's Shifts"
4. Update message text in Node 6: Change "scheduled for" to "scheduled today"
5. Save workflow

### Add Multiple Recipients (Admin Copy)

**To send copy of each SMS to admin:**

1. After "Twilio - Send SMS" node, add another Twilio node
2. Configure:
   - To: `+1555ADMINPHONE` (admin's number)
   - Message: `={{ "FYI - Sent to " + $json.employeeName + ": " + $json.smsMessage }}`
3. Connect from original Twilio node
4. Enable "Continue on Fail" on new node
5. Save workflow

### Customize Message Format

**To change message content:**

1. Click on "Code - Build SMS Message" node
2. Modify the `message` variable in the JavaScript code
3. Example - Add company name:

```javascript
const message = `Hi ${employeeName},

[Your Company Name] Shift Schedule for ${formattedDate}:${shiftList}

Questions? Call 555-1234.`;
```

4. Test with manual execution
5. Save workflow

### Add Shift Notes/Instructions

**To include special instructions from Google Sheets:**

1. Add column to Google Sheets: `Shift Notes`
2. In Node 4 (Group Shifts), add to shifts array:
```javascript
shiftNotes: data['Shift Notes'] || ''
```

3. In Node 6 (Build Message), add to shift list:
```javascript
shiftList += `   Time: ${shift.visitStartTimeOfDay} - ${shift.visitEndTimeOfDay}\n`;
shiftList += `   Address: ${shift.clientAddress}`;
if (shift.shiftNotes) {
  shiftList += `\n   Note: ${shift.shiftNotes}`;
}
```

4. Test and save

## API Quota Usage

### Google Sheets API
- **Free tier:** 300 requests per minute per project
- **Our usage:** 1 read + ~40 updates per day (far below limit)
- **Cost:** $0/month
- **Monitoring:** [Google Cloud Console](https://console.cloud.google.com) → APIs & Services → Dashboard

### Twilio API
- **Rate limit:** 100 SMS/second (default)
- **Trial accounts:** 1 SMS/second
- **Our usage:** 20-100 SMS/day (well below limit)
- **Cost:** $0.0075 per SMS segment (US)
- **Monitoring:** [Twilio Console](https://console.twilio.com) → Monitor → Logs

### n8n Workflow Executions
- **Free tier (cloud):** 2,500 executions/month
- **Our usage:** 30 executions/month (1 per day)
- **Self-hosted:** Unlimited executions
- **Monitoring:** n8n Settings → Usage

## Security Best Practices

1. **Credentials:**
   - Never commit `.mcp.json` to git (contains API key)
   - Rotate Twilio Auth Token periodically (every 90 days)
   - Use OAuth2 for Google Sheets (not API keys)
   - Store credentials only in n8n encrypted database

2. **Phone Numbers:**
   - Validate format before importing to Google Sheets
   - Consider phone number verification flow (opt-in)
   - Comply with SMS consent regulations (TCPA, GDPR)

3. **Data Privacy:**
   - Limit access to Google Sheets (view-only for most staff)
   - Use Google Workspace audit logs
   - Consider data retention policy (delete old shifts)
   - Ensure caregivers consent to SMS notifications

4. **n8n Access:**
   - Use strong passwords for n8n accounts
   - Enable 2FA if available
   - Review workflow permissions regularly
   - Audit execution history for anomalies

## Support and Resources

- **n8n Instance:** [https://n8n.204it.ca](https://n8n.204it.ca)
- **n8n Documentation:** [docs.n8n.io](https://docs.n8n.io)
- **n8n Community Forum:** [community.n8n.io](https://community.n8n.io)
- **Google Sheets API Docs:** [developers.google.com/sheets](https://developers.google.com/sheets)
- **Twilio SMS Docs:** [twilio.com/docs/sms](https://www.twilio.com/docs/sms)
- **Twilio Support:** [support.twilio.com](https://support.twilio.com)

## Workflow Files

- **Workflow JSON:** [caregiver-shift-notifications-daily.json](caregiver-shift-notifications-daily.json)
- **Implementation Plan:** `/Users/ridalakhani/.claude/plans/abundant-munching-lynx.md`
- **This README:** [CAREGIVER-NOTIFICATIONS-README.md](CAREGIVER-NOTIFICATIONS-README.md)

## Changelog

### 2026-01-28 - Initial Creation
- Created 13-node workflow for daily caregiver shift notifications
- Configured daily schedule trigger at 11:45 AM
- Implemented filtering for tomorrow's shifts with valid phone numbers
- Built grouping logic to consolidate multiple shifts per caregiver
- Integrated Twilio SMS sending with error handling
- Added Google Sheets status update with success/failure tracking
- Included comprehensive documentation and troubleshooting guide

---

**Status:** Ready for deployment
**Last Updated:** 2026-01-28
**Version:** 1.0
**Author:** Claude Code

## Quick Start Summary

1. ✅ Set up Google Sheet with required columns
2. ✅ Create Google OAuth2 credentials and connect in n8n
3. ✅ Create Twilio account, get phone number, connect in n8n
4. ✅ Import workflow to n8n
5. ✅ Configure: Document ID, Sheet Name, Twilio "from" number, date format
6. ✅ Enable "Continue on Fail" on Nodes 5, 7, 11, 13
7. ✅ Test with sample data using your phone number
8. ✅ Activate workflow
9. ✅ Monitor first execution at 11:45 AM next day

**Need help?** Check the Troubleshooting section or reach out to n8n community.

main.node: Loop Over Items - Process Each Caregiver
Loop Over Items - Update Each Row
Loop Over Items - Process Each Caregiver
Loop Over Items - Update Each Row
